title: Travel Scrapbooking Class!
excerpt: More exciting news about Craftsy - my online class - Travel Scrapbooking With Amy Tan has launched! It was such a wonderful experience working with Craftsy overall, and I'm lucky to be able to work with such awesome professionals. I…
body:
More exciting news about Craftsy - my online class - Travel Scrapbooking With Amy Tan has launched! It was such a wonderful experience working with Craftsy overall, and I'm lucky to be able to work with such awesome professionals. I traveled to Denver and over the course of 3 days, my fantastic team and I worked for three straight days to produce the best content.

These are some of my favorite layouts I've ever created. Perhaps it's because I get such a thrill in reliving the best moments from travels. Or it's because I've actually used my favorite supplies in meaningful and memorable layouts. I'll show you how to capture the essence of your latest trip and create scrapbook layouts that exude a sense of adventure!

Join me for my online Craftsy class, Travel Scrapbooking With Amy Tan, and go beyond the standard photo-album to preserve special trip moments in dynamic pages. There are seven HD video lessons (over 20 minutes each) that share plenty of tips and techniques to help you document your travels in a modern, fresh and fun way. Love scrapbooking and traveling? Learn to do both at the same time with a lesson for crafting on-the-go. Working with Craftsy was a wonderful experience. Their platform is amazing, I have a huge amount of respect for how they run things. The classes I've enrolled in have been some of my favorite ones I've taken online.

I'll be checking in regularly in the classroom and can't wait to see what you create!
